name: Ainos, Inc.
business: Ainos, Inc. commercializes AI Nose, an AI-based scent digitization platform for industrial environments including semiconductor manufacturing, robotics, and smart manufacturing. It also develops VELDONA, a low-dose oral interferon platform for rare, autoimmune, and infectious diseases, and point-of-care testing devices leveraging VOC sensing.
sellsTo: healthcare (point-of-care testing, senior care, women's health)

exposures.sentence: AI Nose is our core artificial intelligence based scent digitization SmellTech platform designed to enable machines to detect, classify, and interpret scent and volatile organic compound (VOC) signals in real time.
Current and planned use cases include industrial applications across semiconductor manufacturing, robotics, and smart manufacturing settings.
Current and planned use cases include industrial applications across semiconductor manufacturing, robotics, and smart manufacturing settings.
Current and planned use cases include industrial applications across semiconductor manufacturing, robotics, and smart manufacturing settings.
Our VELDONA programs include candidates for the treatment of oral warts in HIV-positive patients, Sjögren's syndrome, and feline chronic gingivostomatitis (FCGS).
Current POCT development efforts emphasize applications that leverage VOC sensing capabilities derived from the AI Nose platform.
Current POCT development efforts emphasize applications that leverage VOC sensing capabilities derived from the AI Nose platform.

AI Nose is initially developed in healthcare-related settings, including point-of-care testing (POCT) and healthcare monitoring use cases such as ventilator-associated pneumonia, women's vaginal health, and selected sexually transmitted infections.
